news.title: Oil prices fall on report Iran sent response to draft peace agreement
news.summary: Under the 1973 War Powers Resolution, a U.S. president needs to withdraw troops 60 days after reporting their deployment to Congress. Under the 1973 war powers resolution, the president must withdraw troops within 60 days of reporting deployment.

news.title: A major shift could soon happen in the Mag 7
news.summary: Shares of Google-parent Alphabet are on the verge of topping $5 trillion. They could overtake AI-leader Nvidia as the world's most valuable company.

news.title: Atlassian stock soars 28% after earnings show strong cloud, data center growth
news.summary: Atlassian's stock has been hit hard in the "SaaS-pocalypse" sweeping software names as AI threatens to disrupt their business models.

news.title: Pentagon tech chief says Anthropic is still blacklisted, but Mythos is a separate issue
news.summary: The DOD announced it has entered into agreements with seven other AI companies. The companies include Google, Facebook, Apple, Microsoft, and others. The DOD says it will use the technology to improve the military.

news.title: Fed dissenters explain 'no' votes, saying they disagreed with hinting next move would be a cut
news.summary: Federal Reserve officials voted against the post-meeting statement. They said they didn't think it was appropriate to signal that the next interest rate move would be lower.

news.title: Embattled U.S. manufacturers show their metal, grow fourth month in a row despite Iran war
news.summary: ISM shows strongest expansion since 2022 — but inflation is a big problem. ISM: "Stronger than expected" growth in U.S. economy in July.

news.title: ‘I hope to retire early’: I’m 56 and have 80% in a traditional IRA and 20% in a Roth. Am I in trouble?
news.summary: “We have $3.5 million in savings — $2. 5 million of which are in retirement accounts,” he says. “We’re in a good place.”

news.title: How a screw-up by Social Security cost widows and widowers over $50 million
news.summary: Thousands have been short-changed of their Social Security payments as a result of blunders. Social Security Administration blunders have affected thousands of people.

news.title: Why it’s time for ‘sell in May and go away’ to die
news.summary: Bloomberg Intelligence says conventional investing wisdom is misguided. One of the most popular pieces of conventional wisdom couldn’t be more misguided, according to a recent analysis.

news.title: Can GLP-1s curb alcohol use? A new study says the drugs can reduce heavy drinking.
news.summary: A “gold standard’ trial found that semaglutide helped reduce drinking in people with obesity who sought out treatment for alcohol-use disorder.
